summary: A handheld selfie-style vlog of new DHS Secretary Mark Mullin giving a casual tour of his office (bouncy balls with agency seals, the cafeteria burger) and praising DHS employees working unpaid during the shutdown, with TikTok-style auto-captions. Despite social-media-native captioning, it is an unscripted talking-head vlog, not music-driven or a pop-culture genre experiment.
notable_text: ANYWAYS JUST WANT; MY TOP FIVE (auto-captions)
